basic_details.job_title: HSL Executive Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Shipyard Limited (HSL) has released the official Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs Notification 2026 at its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the HSL Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Degree in any discipline or Ex-Serviceman not below the rank of Master Chief Petty Officer (MCPO) in the Indian Navy (or equivalent) and aged up to 56 years as on 16-07-2026 can apply online from the available application start date to 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online applica

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit is 56 years as on 16-07-2026
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 56 years as on 16-07-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in any discipline or Ex-Serviceman not below the rank of Master Chief Petty Officer (MCPO) in the Indian Navy (or equivalent).
qualification.details: Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs: Degree in any discipline from a recognized University / deemed university / Institute recognized by UGC. OR Ex-Serviceman not below the rank of Master Chief Petty Officer (MCPO) in the Indian Navy (or equivalent). Experience: Minimum 05 year's post-qualification experience in Administration, Office Management, Secretarial Works, Liaisoning with Indian Navy / Defence PSUs on Project Coordination and other matters related to administrative, logistics and secretarial functions. OR Retired Master Chief Petty Officer (MCPO) from Indian Navy with minimum 10 years of cumulative service in the said rank and demonstrable experience in handling secretarial matters, protocol, liasioning and administrative coordination at the level of Chief of the Naval Staff / Flag Officer / Command Headquarters / Material Organizations.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HSL Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HSL Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HSL Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HSL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HSL Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HSL Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for online submission of applications is 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Executive Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Ex-Servicemen not below the rank of Master Chief Petty Officer (MCPO) in the Indian Navy are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Executive Coordinator position is 56 years as of 16th July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Executive Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000/- per month for the contract period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Executive Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the post of Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for HSL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 300/-. This fee needs to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Executive Coordinator - Corporate Affairs post will be based on a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 5 years of post-qualification experience in administration, office management, or related fields is required. For Ex-Servicemen, specific service experience in the rank of MCPO is detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted on 31st July 2026. Specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry the print-out of their filled online application form along with self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, and any other mandatory enclosures mentioned in the notification.
